title: Ad Astra: Infected
description: A highly performant Modpack that combines Space and tech into a challenging survival based zombie apocalypse!
body:
# What is this?
Ad Astra: Infected is a space survival based modpack that is lightweight and focused on performance so that everyone can play! Currently we feature [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), [Mekanism](https://modrinth.com/mod/mekanism), [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra), and [TaCZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/timeless-and-classics-zero) to help aid in the modern space survival adventure. 

This modpack is best played with others however it is compatible with singleplayer too!
# Recommended System Requirements
### With Distant Horizons and Shaders off
- 4 CPU Threads
- 5GB of Ram
### With Distant Horizons and Shaders on
- 8 CPU Threads
- 8GB of Ram

# Current Modpack Progression
There is a lot to do and this modpack is very incomplete but if you would like to see the progress of it; it will be available for download.

I am a 1 man army right now so If you would like to help contribute to the modpack please stop by the [discord](https://discord.com/invite/4zqfCfAzrp)! Development will be slow so bare with me.
